results.desc: Log tampering: EventID 1102 → P1 critical verdict TRUE_POSITIVE
Audit policy tamper: EventID 4719 → P1 critical
Password spray: 6 users same source IP → CSDE-WIN-025 T1110.003
Credential stuffing: 12 accounts, multiple IPs → CSDE-WIN-026 T1110.004
WSL detection: bash.exe on Windows → CSDE-WIN-028, OS=windows
OS guard: Linux cron rule (CSDE-LNX-003) silent on pure Windows event
OS guard: Windows CSDE-WIN-014 silent on Linux auditd event
Web shell exploit chain: w3wp.exe → cmd.exe → net user /add
Cross-user isolation: alice+bob+charlie from different IPs → separate incidents
Brute force success: CSDE-WIN-003 fires with verdict TRUE_POSITIVE
Verdict TRUE_POSITIVE: ransomware chain → confidence ≥ 90, verdict confirmed
FP suppression: Veeam backup process → no critical incident
logCategory fix: EventID 4688 procdump→lsass fires CSDE-WIN-014
Ransomware + log tampering combo → riskScore=100, P1, TRUE_POSITIVE
